hero.subtitle: Adaptive Information Systems graduate — ready to contribute in web development, data management, and system administration.

about.label: 01 — About
about.p1: A fresh graduate in Information Systems from STMIK Palangkaraya (2021–2025) with a GPA of 3.49. I have a strong interest in web development, data management, graphic design, and technology-based administration.
about.p2: Throughout my studies, I built systems across both backend and frontend, and gained hands-on operational experience through an internship at a government institution.
about.p3: I am an adaptive and detail-oriented individual — comfortable working in both dynamic and structured environments, and always eager to learn new things.

skills.label: 02 — Skills
skills.heading: Technologies &
skills.description: A combination of technical and administrative skills built through formal education and direct work experience.

projects.label: 03 — Projects
projects.heading: Projects I have
projects.description: A selection of web applications, data analysis projects, and information systems I've built.
projects.auth_desc: Use the following credentials to try the app:

pos_caffe.desc: A Point of Sale system for coffee shop operations — featuring inventory management, real-time kitchen display, and transaction reporting.

stockflow.desc: An inventory management app with QR Code scanning for real-time tracking of incoming and outgoing stock.

bank_sampah.desc: A waste bank digitalization platform — managing customer data, waste deposit transactions, and automated reporting.

wanpicture.desc: A photography studio booking platform with no registration required. Clients fill out a form and the admin receives instant WhatsApp notifications for confirmation.

laporan_lapangan.desc: A field reporting system with geospatial data input, multi-level validation, and automated report compilation.

retail_analysis.desc: An end-to-end retail sales analysis project — from exploratory data analysis and RFM customer segmentation to demand forecasting using Holt-Winters, with a Power BI dashboard for stakeholder presentation.
retail_analysis.slide1_desc: Raw dataset loaded with pandas and grouped by product category. Technology leads with $836K in total sales, but Furniture only yields a 2.49% profit margin — a critical insight discovered during initial exploration.
retail_analysis.slide2_desc: Monthly sales aggregated across 2014–2017 using groupby and datetime parsing. The trend reveals consistent year-over-year growth with Q4 seasonal peaks, indicating a reliable demand pattern.
retail_analysis.slide3_desc: Each customer scored 1–4 on Recency, Frequency, and Monetary value. The combined RFM score classifies customers into 8 segments — 28% are Loyal customers, while 6.9% are Lost and require re-engagement strategies.
retail_analysis.slide4_desc: Monthly sales resampled and fed into the Holt-Winters Exponential Smoothing model (statsmodels). The model captures trend and seasonality to predict the next 6 months, peaking at $74,874 in March 2018 with a 95% confidence interval.
retail_analysis.slide5_desc: Dataset loaded into an in-memory SQLite database. SQL queries extract top 10 products by revenue — results are fetched back into pandas and visualized to identify high-value products for inventory prioritization.
retail_analysis.slide6_desc: All analysis insights consolidated into an interactive Power BI dashboard — KPI summary cards, category breakdown, monthly trends, RFM segments, and regional profit distribution for non-technical stakeholder presentation.

food_estate.desc: End-to-end agricultural data analysis using SQL, Python, and Power BI. The system processes harvest data, land productivity, and distribution to provide insights on market efficiency and farmer profitability.
food_estate.slide1_desc: Consolidating all data into a single interactive view. Features regional filters (District/Village) to monitor distribution performance, total revenue per commodity, and market trends specifically per area.
food_estate.slide2_desc: Scatter plot visualization to measure farmer efficiency. Mapping 'Land Size' vs 'Productivity (Kg/Ha)' to identify outliers: farmers with large land but low productivity, or small farmers with maximum yield.
food_estate.slide3_desc: Monthly revenue line chart to identify harvest and distribution seasonal patterns. Helps predict 'High Season' and 'Low Season' in the operational year for stock strategy.
food_estate.slide4_desc: Data extraction process from 5 relational tables (Commodity, Village, Farmer, Harvest, Distribution) using complex JOINs. Ensuring data integrity from the database source to the analysis layer.
food_estate.slide5_desc: Data transformation and cleaning using Pandas. Adding insight columns like 'Harvest Month', 'Productivity per Ha', and 'Distribution Difference' to support analysis in Power BI.

experience.label: 04 — Experience
experience.heading: My educational &
experience.description: From vocational school to university, experiences that shaped my skills today.

edu_degree.role: Bachelor of Computer Science — Information Systems
edu_degree.desc: Undergraduate study focused on information systems development. Built various web projects from concept to deployment — institutional systems, e-commerce platforms, and inventory management tools.

intern_dlh.desc: Responsible for administrative data management and office operations at the Palangka Raya City Environmental Agency. Strengthened document management skills and understanding of government workflows.

smk.desc: Studied graphic design fundamentals, visual content production, and digital media processing — a foundation that sharpened visual sensibility across every digital product I build.

intern_bigprint.desc: Involved in print design production — from receiving client briefs and adjusting design files to quality control. Developed precision and professionalism under tight deadlines.
